title: M.E / M.Tech Jobs 2026 – Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II
org: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II
shortInfo: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026: 1 JRF / Project Associate II vacancy announced. Apply through email mode on or before 10 June 2026. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech qualifications in relevant Mechanical Engineering disciplines can apply for this contractual opportunity.

basic_details.job_title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II post
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026: 1 JRF / Project Associate II vacancy announced. Apply through email mode on or before 10 June 2026. Candidates with B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech qualifications in relevant Mechanical Engineering disciplines can apply for this contractual opportunity.

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the NIT Tiruchirappalli Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.details: JRF: B.E/B.Tech with first class in Mechanical Engineering or M.E/M.Tech with first class in Manufacturing Engineering / Design / Thermal Engineering / Industrial Safety Engineering through CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or National Level examinations by Central Government Departments/Agencies. Project Associate II: B.E/B.Tech with first class in Mechanical Engineering or M.E/M.Tech with first class in Manufacturing Engineering / Design / Thermal Engineering / Industrial Safety Engineering from AICTE/MoE recognized Institute/University and 2 years experience in R&D or Academic Institutions.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the NIT Tiruchirappalli JRF / Project Associate II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: For the JRF position, candidates need a B.E/B.Tech with first class in Mechanical Engineering or M.E/M.Tech with first class in Manufacturing Engineering, Design, Thermal Engineering, or Industrial Safety Engineering, selected through CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent national-level examinations.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the JRF / Project Associate II positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for these positions is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms for JRF candidates.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the JRF / Project Associate II posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 33,000 to Rs. 37,000, plus HRA, depending on their qualifications and GATE status.

faq.question: How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the selection process for the JRF / Project Associate II posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of JRF / Project Associate II in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The positions of JRF / Project Associate II are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
